rules: No game data or runtime server code modified.
Only the logs named by the request were read for extraction.
Names are null when the allowed logs do not expose display names.
Quest/reward associations are only same-folder temporal associations and are marked uncertain unless same-timestamp.

limitations: Vendor display names are not present in the allowed vendor/shop CSV logs.
Stock completeness is evidence completeness within this capture set, not proof of canonical final shop inventory.
